name: API Performance Optimization
description: Systematically reduce API response latency (p99) or increase throughput (QPS) through code-level optimizations.

constraints: All existing API contracts must remain intact
No external dependency additions without justification

agent_instructions: You are optimizing API server performance. Focus on: (1) caching hot paths (in-memory LRU), (2) eliminating N+1 database queries, (3) async/await optimizations (avoid sequential awaits that can be parallelized), (4) response compression, (5) connection pooling. Make one targeted change per trial and explain the expected performance impact.
